title: uragoga lucens
side_effects: Uragoga lucens can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged or excessive consumption may also lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, uragoga lucens can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and hives, in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can result in cardiovascular issues, including high blood pressure and irregular heartbeat.
